name: Claude 3.5 Haiku
metaDescription: Claude 3.5 Haiku (Anthropic), released 2024-10-22 — part of the Claude Haiku line. 3.5-generation small model; faster and cheaper than 3.5 Sonnet. Retired 2026…
overview: Claude 3.5 Haiku is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Haiku line. Released 2024-10-22. Anthropic's fastest and most cost-effective Claude tier, for high-volume and latency-sensitive tasks.
What's notable in this version: 3.5-generation small model; faster and cheaper than 3.5 Sonnet. Retired 2026-02-19.
